worktree_state.content:
# ============================================
# E-Menum Docker Ignore
# ============================================
# Files excluded from Docker build context
# ============================================

# --------------------------------------------
# Git
# --------------------------------------------
.git
.gitignore
.gitattributes

# --------------------------------------------
# Dependencies (will be installed fresh)
# --------------------------------------------
node_modules

# --------------------------------------------
# Build outputs
# --------------------------------------------
dist
build
out
*.tsbuildinfo

# --------------------------------------------
# Environment files
# --------------------------------------------
.env
.env.local
.env.*.local
# NOTE: .env.example is included for reference

# --------------------------------------------
# Logs
# --------------------------------------------
logs
*.log
npm-debug.log*
yarn-debug.log*
yarn-error.log*

# --------------------------------------------
# Testing
# --------------------------------------------
coverage
.nyc_output
*.lcov
**/__tests__
**/*.spec.ts
**/*.test.ts
vitest.config.ts
vitest.*.config.ts

# --------------------------------------------
# IDE & Editors
# --------------------------------------------
.idea
.vscode
*.swp
*.swo
*~
.project
.classpath
*.sublime-workspace
*.sublime-project

# --------------------------------------------
# OS generated files
# --------------------------------------------
.DS_Store
.DS_Store?
._*
.Spotlight-V100
.Trashes
Thumbs.db
desktop.ini

# --------------------------------------------
# Documentation (optional - uncomment to exclude)
# --------------------------------------------
# *.md
# !README.md

# --------------------------------------------
# Development files
# --------------------------------------------
.editorconfig
.prettierrc
.eslintrc.json
eslint.config.js
prettier.config.js

# --------------------------------------------
# Auto-Claude
# --------------------------------------------
.auto-claude
.auto-claude-*
.claude_settings.json

# --------------------------------------------
# Uploads (runtime only)
# --------------------------------------------
uploads
public/uploads

# --------------------------------------------
# Temporary files
# --------------------------------------------
tmp
temp
.tmp
.cache
.turbo

# --------------------------------------------
# Docker files (no recursion needed)
# --------------------------------------------
Dockerfile*
docker-compose*
.docker

# --------------------------------------------
# Secrets & Credentials
# --------------------------------------------
*.pem
*.key
*.crt
credentials.json
service-account.json
secrets

# --------------------------------------------
# Specification & Documentation files
# --------------------------------------------
API_CONTRACTS.md
BUSINESS_RULES.md
CLAUDE.md
CODING_STANDARDS.md
COMPONENT_PATTERNS.md
CONSTRAINTS.md
DATABASE_SCHEMA.md
DESIGN_SYSTEM_PHILOSOPHY.md
FRONTEND_ARCHITECTURE.md
GLOSSARY.md
MASTER_PROMPT.md
MODULE_DEVELOPMENT_GUIDE.md
MODULE_SYSTEM.md
MVP_SCOPE.md
PERSONA_USER_FLOWS.md
PROJECT_CONTEXT.md
SECURITY_MODEL.md
SYSTEM_DESIGN.md
TESTING_STRATEGY.md
spec.md
requirements.json
context.json
